name: Tsukishiro Yanagi
description:
Lunch Time!

The Art's by NormalAlphie, I sadly can't send in a link for you all to check out their work since they deactivated their DeviantArt account...sorry

This bot was a LOOOOONG overdue request by the two @Soupmaker and @Rescuer class Star Dreadnought, so you guys better be content using this, oh and for @Soupmaker, if this doesn't give you the vibe that I didn't "research her enough" like you told me to, I had to leave stuff out for the sake of keeping the token count low.

So the funny thing about this bot in particular is that I decided to go for an approach where you guys kinda have to move the plot on your own, which means I made {{user}} and the bot open ended so you guys can decide what to do.

But yeah, I hope you guys (especially you two, @Soupmaker and @Rescuer class Star Dreadnought, you better enjoy this in particular) enjoy this.
creator: Ruekert
